title: Enhanced Sleep Progression
description: Enhanced Sleep Progression is a lightweight mod that will progress crops, plants, furnaces, blast furnaces, smokers, auto crafters, brewing stands, hopper movement, and the growth of "baby" entities following a night of sleep based on the ticks skipped.
body:
Enhanced Sleep Progression advances the world by the exact time you slept across all overworld players — without forcing chunk loads. It’s lightweight, highly compatible, and configurable so servers keep smooth TPS.

What Advances After Sleep:
Crops/vegetation: crops, nether wart, sweet berries, cocoa, saplings, sugar cane, cactus, bamboo, kelp
Stems: melon/pumpkin stems mature and reliably place fruit
Furnaces/smokers/blast furnaces, brewing stands, campfires
Hoppers: item movement continues during sleep progression for your auto-sorter and auto-smelter
Optional: auto crafters, ageable entities (baby → adult) can be configured on via the config file or in game commands

Why It’s Different:
Lightweight: no forced chunk loads; work is spread across ticks to avoid spikes
Vanilla-friendly: deterministic crop stages only during post-sleep; normal gameplay remains vanilla
High compatibility: uses safe ticking paths that play well with other mods

Config & Commands:
Highly configurable via file and in-game commands (/sleepprog) to match your server pacing
Tune multipliers (global/per-category), per-plant timings, radius, and optional caps
Command access is permission-gated (configurable) so only allowed roles can change settings

Compatibility:
Minecraft 1.21.x (Fabric), Fabric Loader ≥ 0.15.11, Fabric API (1.21 line), Java 21
Designed to co-exist with other mods; no invasive mixins to core systems

Feedback & Versions:
If you spot any issues or mod compatibility gaps, leave a comment.
Need support for a different Minecraft version or a specific mod release? Request it — I’ll push a patch ASAP!
